markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine the product UI and UX for the March launch.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=954.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**March Goals:** The March launch targets two goals: 1) increase team leverage by automating manual setup and opportunity finding, and 2) provide a client-facing system to demonstrate value.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
  - [**UI Redesign:** The "Setup" screen will be redesigned as a sequential workflow, replacing ambiguous checkboxes with clear "Generate" and "Review" actions to ensure staff accountability and prevent skipping critical steps.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [**Core Loop Defined:** The product's core loop was defined as: Find Opportunities → Learn & Improve → Execute Work → Report Progress. This structure separates high-level strategy from execution.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=6819.0)
  - [**Work Queue Replaced:** The "Work Queue" will be eliminated. New page creation will be integrated into the "New Page Opportunities" tab, while optimization will become "Improvement Experiments" within the "Learn & Improve" tab, reframing tasks as goal-oriented tests.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=9061.0)

## Topics

### Product Context & March Goals

  - [**Problem:** The team's current service model has diminishing economies of scale, and manual processes are a bottleneck.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=784.0)
  - [**Solution:** A product to automate key tasks and provide a client-facing system, enabling a shift from services to a scalable platform.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [**March Launch Goals:**](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=1164.0)
    1.  [**Increase Team Leverage:** Automate manual account setup and opportunity finding to raise the team's baseline performance.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)
    2.  [**Provide Client Transparency:** Offer a system for clients to view progress, even if only via a shared screen on a call.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=1428.0)

### Redesigning the "Setup" Workflow

  - [**Problem:** The current "Setup" screen is ambiguous, using checkboxes that don't reflect the required work. This risks staff skipping critical steps.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
  - [**Solution:** Redesign as a sequential workflow with explicit actions.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
      - [**Actions:** Replace checkboxes with clear "Generate" and "Review" buttons.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=2580.0)
      - [**Sequence:** Number steps to guide users through the required order.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=2494.0)
      - [**Status:** Display progress (e.g., "Generated by Marcel, Feb 2nd") to provide accountability.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=2377.0)
      - [**Skipping:** Replace the "Skip" button with a more deliberate "Does not apply" option to force a conscious decision.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=3095.0)

### Defining the Core Product Loop

  - [The product's core loop was defined to provide a clear structure for the UI.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=6819.0)
  - [**The Loop:**](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=6819.0)
    1.  [**Find Opportunities:** Discover new content ideas.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=5232.0)
    2.  [**Learn & Improve:** Analyze existing content to find optimization patterns.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=7350.0)
    3.  [**Execute Work:** Perform the actual creation or optimization.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=8738.0)
    4.  [**Report Progress:** Communicate outcomes to clients.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=6568.0)

### Restructuring Navigation & Workflows

  - [**Problem:** The "Work Queue" tab is a "soul-killing" list of tasks that feels like pure labor, lacking context or purpose.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=9061.0)
  - [**Solution:** Eliminate the "Work Queue" and integrate work directly into the strategic tabs.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=9061.0)
      - [**New Page Opportunities:** This tab will now contain the entire pipeline for new content (Brief → Draft → Review → Publish).](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=9329.0)
      - [**Learn & Improve:** This tab will house "Improvement Experiments."](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=10026.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Optimization is reframed as goal-oriented testing (e.g., "Improve CTR on X page"). This makes the work more meaningful and avoids the "HGTV effect" where clients only see the exciting "before and after."](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=10026.0)
          - [**March Scope:** For March, this tab will focus on page scoring and recommendations. The full experimentation engine is a fast-follow.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=9984.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Daniel:**](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
      - [Redesign the "Setup" screen as a sequential "Generate" and "Review" workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=2194.0)
      - [Integrate the new page creation pipeline into the "New Page Opportunities" tab.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=9329.0)
      - [Implement the "Learn & Improve" tab for page scoring and recommendations.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=9984.0)
      - [Send Ryan a video and GitHub link for the open-source AI framework.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=10555.0)
  - [**Ryan:**](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=10314.0)
      - [Assess capacity for increased involvement after starting a new 5-month project.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=10349.0)
      - [Provide an update on availability before the next session.](https://fathom.video/share/AoKRZMm_gRoaJi3i1jzuRMjxKGgzff6z?tab=summary&timestamp=10546.0)
